name: East Texas Corn Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees F.
2. Place bacon drippings in a skillet and place it in the oven while it is heating. The skillet must be hot before the batter is added.
3. In a large mixing bowl, beat together buttermilk and egg. Sift in dry ingredients and mix well.
4. Pour half of the grease from the skillet into the batter and mix well.
5. Pour the remaining grease into the skillet and pour in the batter.
6. Bake at 400 degrees F for approximately 30 minutes.
